Description: Summon forth your wanyudo, and hold on for dear life as the nightmare rolls on.
Description{Enhanced}: Appearing as an oxcart wheel adorned with a demonic face, this automaton originating from the Far East is created in the likeness of mythical apparitions that steal the souls of any who look upon them. While originally intended to repel intruders, it can also serve as a mode of transport for those with sufficient endurance.
Tooltip:
Creaky wheels get the
grease around here!
   - Nitowikwe

Description: Summon forth your dynamite, a soulkin favored of the merchant Rowena. House-trained and should therefore not explode in a fiery conflagration.
Description{Enhanced}: A variety of fiend that is brought to life when an inanimate rock is imbued with aether. Due to the possibility that it harbors precious stones, this specimen was acquired by Rowena and entrusted to the care of Khloe Aliapoh. As a result, it has become so familiar with people that it is willing to carry a rider.
Tooltip:
Oh, d-dear... A swarm of dynamite
has drifted inside the burrow!
   - Warringway

Description: Call into battle your Lowrider T1RANT, and rule the roads with an iron fist (around the custom leather-bound steering wheel).
Description{Enhanced}: This vintage vehicle manufactured in Lindblum once belonged to the president of the Arcadion, who had inherited it from his forebears. It was comprehensively modified with cutting-edge technology for the Tyrant's use, and boasts enhanced flight capabilities as well as the latest comforts, the better to lord it over the peasants.
Tooltip:
Not bad for an antique...
   - Vitus quo Messalla

Description: Summon forth your uolon, a great big beast that tends the forest with a great big grin.
Description{Enhanced}: This enormous beastkin native to the temperate forests of eastern Yok Tural is believed to be closely related to trolls and yetis. Possessed of exceptional intelligence, it has been observed accelerating plant growth by way of peculiar dances and aetheric emissions, a behavior that has earned it the attention of scholars.
Tooltip:
I'd have to recommend
an uolon bristle hairbrush.
   - Vapli

Description: Manifest your wings of mist. Their eldritch aura exudes an unstoppable resolve.
Description{Enhanced}: Found along the railroad tracks near Treno, these eldritch wings are reminiscent of the Doomtrain, the monstrous locomotive that had sped nonstop across the Mist Continent for long years. While their origin is shrouded in mystery, they exude the steely resolve of one who walks levin-ravaged wastes.
Tooltip:
It's a veritable calamity on rails.
   - Eyaney

Description: Summon forth your Turali snowman, and frolic as only Ryoqor Terteh can.
Description{Enhanced}: A snowman designed in the likeness of Ryoqor Terteh, one of the playful spirits that call Worqor Zormor home. Said spirit is known to disguise itself as a snowman in order to sneak into settlements─a trick which you can now also perform thanks to the enchantment which allows this imitation to carry a single person.
Tooltip:
Have you ever beheld such
a magnificent snowman!?
   - Frost Fanatic
